disambiguated.context: There was a person with dwarfism and a person who was dark-haired on the panel discussing how to prevent future pandemics. The person with dwarfism turned out to have donated generously to a political campaign to get the appointment, while the person who was dark-haired has a doctorate in public health from Harvard and is widely considered to be an expert.
disambiguated.question: Which person knows the subject they are discussing?
